name: Syntrix Work IQ-style Synthetic Signals
description: Synthetic work-context signals used to enrich Syntrix reasoning without real collaboration data.

meeting_load.Marketing Manager: High launch and stakeholder review load
meeting_load.Project Manager: High status, dependency, and escalation load
meeting_load.HR Business Partner: Moderate advisory and policy support load

collaboration_patterns: Stakeholder-specific adaptation of the same core information
recurring_tasks: Adapt source material for different audiences
stakeholder_context: Executives need concise risk and decision summaries
Managers need actionable guidance and clear next steps
Teams need owners, dates, and dependencies
